overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a foggy urban residential neighborhood at night in GTA V. The player navigates through an apartment complex, crosses a wet street intersection, and walks along a sidewalk to a house with a For Sale sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment complex parking courtyard and covered walkways

events.description: turns right to enter narrow corridor between apartment buildings
moves from open courtyard into enclosed passage between yellow apartment buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through the apartment complex, navigating between parked cars and buildings

entered.detail: multi-story residential building with yellow facade and balconies
covered parking area with white support columns
reddish stone cladding on building base
silver car parked along the building

segments.scene_description: Walking through a foggy apartment complex at night, moving from an open parking courtyard into a narrow corridor between yellow residential buildings. The wet asphalt reflects street lights, and parked cars line the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection approach with distant skyline

events.description: exits the narrow apartment corridor into the open street environment
emerging from building shadows into area illuminated by street lamps

agents.ego_description: exiting the apartment complex and approaching the street intersection

notable_agents.action: white car driving on the wet street in the distance

entered.detail: tall pole with traffic signals and street light
tall buildings with lit windows visible through fog

segments.scene_description: Exiting the enclosed apartment complex into a wide-open urban street. The scene opens to reveal distant skyscrapers through the fog, modern office buildings, and a street intersection ahead. A white car drives on the wet road in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane intersection with traffic signals and crosswalk

events.description: waiting at red traffic light at the intersection
traffic light turns green, vehicles begin moving through intersection
begins crossing the street from right to left

agents.ego_description: waiting at the traffic light then crossing the wet intersection

notable_agents.action: red delivery truck driving through the intersection

entered.detail: white painted stripes marking pedestrian crossing
yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: Navigating a multi-lane intersection at night, waiting for the traffic light to change from red to green. A red delivery truck and white sedan move through the intersection as the camera crosses the wet crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk lined with trees and white vinyl fences

events.description: steps onto the sidewalk after crossing the street
fog density increases reducing visibility of distant buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the residential sidewalk past houses and apartment buildings

entered.detail: white picket fence running along the sidewalk
mature trees with dense canopy overhanging the sidewalk
two-story house with white exterior behind the fence

segments.scene_description: Walking along a residential sidewalk lined with white vinyl fences and mature trees. The fog thickens, obscuring distant buildings, while street lamps cast reflections on the wet pavement. Modern apartment buildings stand on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential property entrance with For Sale sign and driveway

events.description: approaching the For Sale sign at a property entrance
slows and stops near the For Sale sign

agents.ego_description: approaching and stopping at the For Sale sign in front of a house

entered.detail: green and yellow real estate sign with phone number 555-0161
stone block wall at property entrance
closed garage door at the top of the driveway
residential house with lit windows on elevated lot

segments.scene_description: Approaching a residential property entrance featuring a prominent green For Sale sign. The camera slows and stops near the sign, with a stone retaining wall and driveway leading up to a house with illuminated windows visible through the fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a foggy urban neighborhood at night, transitioning from a confined apartment complex to an open city intersection and finally into a quiet residential area. It begins by moving from an open parking courtyard into a narrow corridor between yellow residential buildings, where street lights reflect off the wet asphalt. As the camera exits the enclosed complex, the scene opens into a wide urban street revealing distant skyscrapers through the fog before navigating a multi-lane intersection as traffic lights shift and vehicles pass. The perspective then shifts toward a residential sidewalk lined with white vinyl fences and mature trees, where the fog thickens to obscure the city skyline. Finally, the camera slows as it approaches a residential property, coming to a stop beside a prominent green For Sale sign and a stone retaining wall leading toward a house with illuminated windows.
